data.title: Rockwell Automation Partnering with Feeding America Eastern Wisconsin and Fork Farms to Create Clock Tower Farms
data.description: A company specializing in industrial automation and digital transformation, Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK), has revealed a new initiative in Milwaukee. In collaboration with Feeding America Eastern Wisconsin, the state's largest hunger relief organization, they have established Clock Tower Farms. This innovative project will utilize hydroponic farming technology from Fork Farms along with Rockwell's automation technology to produce fresh and nutritious food. The aim is to combat hunger in the community. Clock Tower Farms represents a significant step towards addressing food insecurity in the region.

data.title: AutoNation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: AutoNation, Inc. announced its first quarter 2026 revenue of $6.6 billion, reflecting a 2% decrease from the previous year. Earnings per share (EPS) for the quarter were $5.85, up from $4.45 in the same period last year, while Adjusted EPS stood at $4.69, compared to $4.68 a year ago. The company reported record gross profit in its Aftermarket segment for the quarter. Non-GAAP financial measure reconciliations can be found in the accompanying financial tables.

data.title: Colgate Announces 1st Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: New York-based Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) reported a notable 8.4% increase in net sales, accompanied by a 2.9% rise in organic sales for the first quarter of 2026. These figures include a slight 0.6% decline in sales attributed to lower private label pet food. Despite a 6% decrease in GAAP EPS to $0.80, the Base Business EPS saw a significant upsurge of 7% to $0.97. Both GAAP and Base Business Gross profit margin experienced a slight decline of 20 basis points, settling at 60.6%. The company also disclosed a substantial net cash flow of $747 million from operations within the same period. Colgate-Palmolive maintains its position as a market leader in the toothpaste sector.

data.title: Church & Dwight Reports Q1 2026 Results
data.description: In Ewing, New Jersey, Church & Dwight Co., Inc. disclosed that they have outperformed their projections for the first quarter. The company, listed under NYSE as CHD, witnessed robust sales, expanded gross margins, increased earnings, and ongoing market share growth worldwide. The initial quarter of 2026 saw a rise in net sales by 0.2% to reach $1,469.3 million, surpassing the anticipated 1% decline. Notably, organic sales showed a remarkable growth of 5.0%, well above the estimated 3% increase as part of the company's strategic actions for 2025.

data.title: Auto Supplier Magna Trims 2026 Sales Outlook
data.description: Magna International, Inc. (NYSE: MGA) exceeded expectations in its first-quarter financial report, revealing a significant earnings beat. The company, a prominent automotive supplier with operations in North America, Europe, the Asia Pacific region, and globally, reported earnings of $1.38 per share. This surpassed the predicted $1.01 per share and marked a notable increase from the 78 cents per share recorded in the same period last year. Quarterly sales stood at $10.381 billion, higher than the estimated $10.255 billion and showing steady growth from the $10.069 billion recorded in the previous year's quarter according to Benzinga Pro data. In light of these results, Magna International adjusted its full-year revenue expectations. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Micro Combined Heat and Power Market worth $5.77 billion by 2031 | MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, recent data from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the worldwide Micro Combined Heat and Power Market is expected to see substantial expansion. The market size is forecasted to increase from USD 3.69 billion in 2026 to USD 5.77 billion by 2031. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.3% over the five-year forecast period.

data.title: Aqua Pennsylvania Completes Improvements Laurel Lakes and Rivercrest Wastewater Treatment Plants
data.description: Aqua Pennsylvania has finished two significant wastewater treatment projects in Northeastern Pennsylvania, costing around $17 million. The enhancements were carried out at Aqua's Laurel Lakes Wastewater Treatment Plant in Rice Township, Luzerne County, and Rivercrest Wastewater Treatment Plant in Tunkhannock Township, Wyoming County. These upgrades aim to boost system efficiency and guarantee long-term service reliability. Key improvements encompass the installation of new equipment and technology at both plants.

data.title: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. Announces 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders' Date
data.description: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. disclosed their plans for the upcoming annual stockholders' meeting on June 24, 2026, at 10:00 AM ET. The event, which will be held virtually, is accessible to stockholders who were recorded as of April 27, 2026 (the “Record Date”). LIEN, traded on NASDAQ, is a specialty finance company functioning as a business development company. The company made this announcement, indicating it will follow Broadridge's Virtual Shareholder Meeting protocol.

data.title: OTC Markets Group Welcomes Silver Viper Minerals Corp. to OTCQX
data.description: On May 1, 2026, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Silver Viper Minerals Corp., a Canadian junior mineral exploration company, has been approved to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. This market, operated by OTC Markets Group Inc., facilitates trading for around 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Silver Viper Minerals Corp., previously listed on the OTCQB® Venture Market, now trades under the tickers TSX-V: VIPR and OTCQX: VIPRF on the OTCQX market. This move signifies an upgrade in their trading status.

data.title: Molecular Partners publishes Phase 1 MP0317 data in Nature Cancer demonstrating tumor-localized CD40 activation and tumor microenvironment remodeling
data.description: Switzerland-based Molecular Partners AG (SIX: MOLN; NASDAQ: MOLN) shared Phase 1 clinical data in Nature Cancer, showing promise of their tumor-localized CD40 agonist, MP0317, to impact the tumor microenvironment (TME). MP0317 aims to activate immune cells in the TME by binding to fibroblast activation protein (FAP), abundant in solid tumors' stroma. This approach could offer enhanced effectiveness with reduced side effects compared to traditional CD40-targeting treatments.

data.title: OIO Group Announces New Leadership, Board Appointments and Strategic Roadmap for Ultra-Luxury Mobility Platform
data.description: The OIO Group has revealed recent developments, including the appointment of new Board members and the submission of 6-K filings. They have also unveiled a strategic plan aimed at furthering an ultra-luxury mobility platform centered around De Tomaso. This move signals a significant shift in the company's direction, with an emphasis on advancing their offerings in the high-end mobility sector.

data.title: Shenandoah Telecommunications Company Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Shenandoah Telecommunications Company, also known as Shentel and listed under Nasdaq as SHEN, revealed its financial and operating results for the first quarter of 2026 in Edinburg, Virginia, on May 01, 2026.

data.title: Sachem Capital schedules Q1 2026 earnings release and conference call date.
data.description: A recent study reveals that the global economy is expected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, marking the fastest pace in 80 years. This significant growth is primarily driven by economic recoveries across various countries, with China leading the way with a projected 8.5% growth rate. The United States is expected to follow closely behind with a forecasted growth of 6.4%. However, disparities remain evident, with emerging economies facing challenges in their recovery processes. The International Monetary Fund highlights the importance of continued policy support to sustain this economic momentum and ensure a more equitable global recovery.

data.title: MapLight Therapeutics Announces Completion of Enrollment in ZEPHYR Phase 2 Trial and Updates Expected Timing of Topline Results
data.description: Today, MapLight Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed that it has finished enrolling participants for its Phase 2 ZEPHYR trial, which is assessing the effectiveness of ML-007C-MA in treating schizophrenia. The company has also wrapped up the last patient visit for its Phase 2 IRIS trial, focusing on evaluating ML-004 for treating autism spectrum disorder. MapLight Therapeutics, Inc. plans to release the top-line outcomes from both Phase 2 trials by around mid-August 2026.

data.title: Esperion to be Acquired by ARCHIMED
data.description: Shareholders of Esperion will be offered $3.16 per share in cash upon closing of the deal, along with the opportunity to partake in potential contingent milestone payments totaling up to $100 million in aggregate.

data.title: Wabash Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Lafayette, Indiana, on May 1, 2026, Wabash (NYSE: WNC) announced its financial results for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. Wabash is a prominent provider of comprehensive supply chain services for the transportation, logistics, and infrastructure sectors.

data.title: Phreesia Sets Release Date for Fiscal First Quarter 2027 Results
data.description: A company operating fully remotely based in Wilmington, Delaware, Phreesia, is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2027 on Wednesday, May 27, 2026, after the market closes.
